title: CloverCraftSMP Season 2
description: Season 2 of our SMP, including lots of small Vanilla+ improvements to the base game of 1.21.1
body:
![cc s2 cover art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ead0bf8781e4772e24c807aa618268afde21ab6c.png)

# 🍀 CloverCraft Season 2 🍀

Our custom modpack including backports of vanilla features from new versions, performance enhancements and small improvements to the base game to make your Vanilla+ experience the best it could be!

Designed for players who love the core Minecraft experience but crave more depth, beauty, and impressive performance. We've hand-picked a collection of mods that enhance, rather than replace, vanilla gameplay. Explore a world that feels both fresh and familiar, optimized to run smoothly and filled with new details to discover around every corner.

## ✨ What to Expect

- **🚀 Blazing Fast Performance:** Experience Minecraft smoother than ever before with a suite of modern performance mods, including Sodium, Lithium, and Distant Horizons.
- **🌍 A World Reimagined:** Explore breathtaking new biomes and discover completely overhauled vanilla structures. The world is brimming with new places to see, from majestic capitals to deeper oceans and improved cave systems.
- **✅ Quality of Life Galore:** Enjoy countless small improvements that make gameplay more intuitive, from inventory management and recipe viewing with EMI to improved map tools and UI enhancements.
- **🏡 More to Build & Do:** Expand your creative potential with new building blocks from Supplementaries, new foods and farming mechanics with Farmer's Delight, and new decorative options.
- **💬 Made for Multiplayer:** Built-in voice chat, chat heads, and skin-sharing mods make it perfect for playing with friends right out of the box.

<details>
<summary>💖 Credits</summary>

This modpack wouldn't exist without the hard work of many talented creators. We'd like to extend our deepest gratitude to them! 🙏

**All Mod Authors:** A massive thank you to every single developer whose mod is featured in this pack. Your creativity is the foundation of this entire project. Please support them on Modrinth and CurseForge!

**Community & Friends:** Thank you to everyone who supported us on Ko-Fi, helped test the pack and give feedback!
